name: RX Recorder
author: contributors
description: Records the demodulated RX (band) audio you hear to a WAV file, via the host's read-only RX audio tap. Capture-only: does not alter the audio or occupy an insert-chain slot. Realtime-safe — the audio thread writes a lock-free ring and a background thread flushes to disk. Recordings land under the plugin folder and are downloadable from the panel.
